title: dont go
lyrics: Yeah I know you're sittin' there, I know it gets real hard Don't it, don't it, don't it, don't it, don't show it, nah Don't show it when you're feelin' mad, nah Don't show it when you're feelin' high, high, high Don't show it when you're feelin' it always Don't show it when you're emotional these days Don't show the no way you come in Make people think you a rock and a nomad Don't wanna be that, don't let vulnerability come Like a heart attack, ooh Don't go but, ooh Don't show but Don't go, don't, don't go, don't go, don't, don't go Don't go, don't, don't go, don't go, please don't Go Away from me again I know it's hard, I know it's hard, I know it's hard, I know it's hard I just wanna tell you, you're my friend from the beginning You're the beginning that came from the start You lost my touch before I did So many crimes that I could say that I'm not divine no more Yeah I took a left way, took a right way Should've been a payday, but I just left ya, just left ya There wasn't no regret here, but I'm just askin' you Baby just please don't, please don't, please don't go Please don't, please don't, please don't go Please don't go Don't go on a holiday away from me A holiday far away from the things that we do Let me go all alone It's not like I don't care that I have all the time in the world Cause one day it turns to And the other day goes right I don't wanna fight no more Just don't go away, no No time back here, I know you're up And I'm tellin' you, you can't, but you can if you want Maybe as a plea, as a start, I'll bring you some of that That daylight, that far away, I hear it It's far away, but I don't fear it Darkness, yeah, far away, I'll rest there Yeah, be nice to me still Please, please don't go Please, please, please don't go Just please don't go Please, please, please don't go Yeah, please don't go Yeah, please don't show Please don't go Don't show any emotional thing anymore Don't like that shit, yeah, I fuckin' will It's what I hear in my head Don't matter what the fuck they say Please don't go, please don't Please don't, yeah, please don't go Please, please, please, please don't go Please don't go Please don't go Please don't go Please don't go I don't like it better than this She said, don't go away, I can tell you it's new I don't like it better than this Please don't go away, I can tell you that's new Please don't go Please don't go Don't go away Don't go away Don't go away I don't like it better than this I don't like it better than this I don't like it better than this I don't like it better than this

lyricsSegments.text: Yeah I know you're sittin' there, I know it gets real hard
Don't it, don't it, don't it, don't it, don't show it, nah
Don't show it when you're feelin' mad, nah
Don't show it when you're feelin' high, high, high
Don't show it when you're feelin' it always
Don't show it when you're emotional these days
Don't show the no way you come in
Make people think you a rock and a nomad
Don't wanna be that, don't let vulnerability come
Like a heart attack, ooh
Don't go but, ooh
Don't show but
Don't go, don't, don't go, don't go, don't, don't go
Don't go, don't, don't go, don't go, please don't
Go
Away from me again
I know it's hard, I know it's hard, I know it's hard, I know it's hard
I just wanna tell you, you're my friend from the beginning
You're the beginning that came from the start
You lost my touch before I did
So many crimes that I could say that I'm not divine no more
Yeah I took a left way, took a right way
Should've been a payday, but I just left ya, just left ya
There wasn't no regret here, but I'm just askin' you
Baby just please don't, please don't, please don't go
Please don't, please don't, please don't go
Please don't go
Don't go on a holiday away from me
A holiday far away from the things that we do
Let me go all alone
It's not like I don't care that I have all the time in the world
Cause one day it turns to
And the other day goes right
I don't wanna fight no more
Just don't go away, no
No time back here, I know you're up
And I'm tellin' you, you can't, but you can if you want
Maybe as a plea, as a start, I'll bring you some of that
That daylight, that far away, I hear it
It's far away, but I don't fear it
Darkness, yeah, far away, I'll rest there
Yeah, be nice to me still
Please, please don't go
Please, please, please don't go
Just please don't go
Please, please, please don't go
Yeah, please don't go
Yeah, please don't show
Please don't go
Don't show any emotional thing anymore
Don't like that shit, yeah, I fuckin' will
It's what I hear in my head
Don't matter what the fuck they say
Please don't go, please don't
Please don't, yeah, please don't go
Please, please, please, please don't go
Please don't go
Please don't go
Please don't go
Please don't go
I don't like it better than this
She said, don't go away, I can tell you it's new
I don't like it better than this
Please don't go away, I can tell you that's new
Please don't go
Please don't go
Don't go away
Don't go away
Don't go away
I don't like it better than this
I don't like it better than this
I don't like it better than this
I don't like it better than this
